lead.description: Capchase is the modern vendor financing platform built for B2B software, cloud, and hardware companies. Our solution helps businesses offer flexible payment terms to their customers while getting paid upfront on every deal. By embedding financing into the sales process, Capchase helps vendors close more deals, increase contract value, and access their booked revenue immediately—without balance sheet risk or added debt. And doing so in an intuitive platform that matches the speed and needs of modern sales and finance teams.
